payload:
# Office of Accountability — Implementation Prompt

## Objective

Build a civic knowledge platform for Argentine politics as an interactive graph explorer. The platform links politicians, votes, legislation, donors, promises, and user-contributed research into a single explorable, queryable system powered by Neo4j and deployed on Cloudflare Workers via Vinext.

## Stack

- **Frontend + API + SSR:** Vinext (App Router, Server Components, Route Handlers) → Cloudflare Workers
- **Database:** Ne... [truncated, 4486 chars total]
Neo4j client wrapper implemented: lib/neo4j/{client,config,types,index}.ts with typed query helpers, managed transactions, Zod config validation. Typecheck passes. Committed as 5da95a6.

Closed schema-init task (already committed). Implemented ESLint+Prettier: prettier config, eslint integration, fixed npm lockfile, formatted all files. All checks pass (lint, typecheck, format). M0 scaffolding complete.
Closed ETL types (already committed) + implemented & committed ETL fetcher. Next: transformer, loader, runner.
Implemented ETL transformer (task-1773734921-a66d). Pure functions mapping Como Voto → Neo4j params. Committed 7fb06b1. Next: loader, runner.
Implemented ETL loader (task-1773734921-b286). Batch MERGE into Neo4j using UNWIND, parameterized queries, configurable batch sizes. Committed 3f86ec2. Next: runner script.

Implemented ETL runner script (task-1773734921-bf13). CLI at scripts/run-etl-como-voto.ts, npm run etl:como-voto. Full pipeline: fetch → transform → load. M1 Data Ingestion code-complete. Committed bb6fdee.

Implemented graph transform utilities (task-1773735758-1771). lib/graph/transform.ts with pure functions: transformNode, transformRelationship, transformNeighborRecords, transformNodeRecords, mergeGraphData. Committed b112376. Next: graph query service.
Implemented graph query service (task-1773735767-c4d1). lib/graph/queries.ts with getNodeNeighborhood, searchNodes, searchNodesByLabel. Committed c062474. API route tasks now unblocked.
Implemented API route GET /api/graph/node/[id] (task-1773735780-9119). Zod-validated input, 404/503 error handling. Committed 5b265f6. One M2 task remaining: GET /api/graph/search.

Implemented API route GET /api/graph/search (task-1773735780-a43d). Zod-validated q/limit/label params, fulltext search across all indexes or filtered by label. Committed 9a0e26e. M2 Graph API is now complete — all 4 tasks closed.

Installed react-force-graph-2d and created ForceGraph wrapper component (task-1773736476-41c4). Client component with label-based coloring, custom canvas rendering, click-to-select, visibility filtering, responsive sizing. Committed c7f15b0. M3 tasks created: SearchBar, NodeDetailPanel, TypeFilter, Explorer page.

Created SearchBar component (task-1773736478-19b0). Debounced search with autocomplete, keyboard nav, ARIA combobox, abort controller. Committed 50844ed. Remaining M3: NodeDetailPanel, TypeFilter, Explorer page.

Created NodeDetailPanel component (task-1773736478-1e39). Side panel with node properties, label badges, grouped neighbors by relationship type, click-through navigation. Committed a38c137. Remaining M3: TypeFilter, Explorer page.
Created TypeFilter component (task-1773736480-fcc2). Toggleable pill filters for node types with label-colored active state, toggle-all, ARIA. Committed d33b083. Remaining M3: Explorer page.

Created /explorar Graph Explorer page (task-1773736482-de64). Full-screen explorer wiring ForceGraph + SearchBar + NodeDetailPanel + TypeFilter. Search-to-explore flow, click navigation, type filtering, detail panel. Committed bc957b0. M3 Graph Explorer is complete.
M4 politician profile page complete: SSR at /politico/[slug] with vote history, graph sub-view, Schema.org JSON-LD, OG tags. Committed 4be8d57. M4 milestone code-complete.
M5 Auth types + Neo4j adapter complete: @auth/core installed, custom Neo4j adapter (User/Account/VerificationToken), PBKDF2 password hashing via Web Crypto, JWT sessions. Committed 3e8bbcb.
Auth UI complete: sign-in, sign-up, error pages + UserMenu component. M5 Auth code-complete. Committed f3d10e0.
Investigation Neo4j query functions — CRUD + list + REFERENCES edge sync. Committed 4577a90.
Investigation CRUD API routes — POST/GET/PATCH/DELETE at /api/investigations with auth, ownership checks, Zod validation. Committed 63d6f3d.
Investigation create/edit pages committed dd91253. Remaining: reading page + index pages.
Investigation reading page committed 603ce70. Remaining: index + my investigations pages.
installed satori + resvg-wasm, created lib/og/render.ts with renderOgImage() and ogImageResponse() helpers. Committed b834817. Next: politician OG image route.
created politician OG image route at /api/og/politician/[slug] with dark-themed 1200x630 PNG (satori JSX). Committed f8d6260. Next: investigation OG image route.
created investigation OG image route at /api/og/investigation/[slug] with dark-themed 1200x630 PNG (title, summary, tags, author). Committed 057e7c5. Next: wire OG images into metadata.
wired OG images into politician + investigation generateMetadata. openGraph.images + twitter.images pointing to /api/og/ routes. Committed 2c35e22. Next: PDF export for investigations.
Rate limiting middleware + security headers committed (2b6aa9f). Tiered rate limits on all API routes. Security headers on all routes. 2 M8 tasks remain: homepage upgrade, seed content.
Homepage upgraded with navigation, hero, section cards, latest investigations grid, stats, and footer (7094ad5). 1 M8 task remains: seed investigation content.
Seed investigation content complete (007c5de). 4 investigations seeded with TipTap JSON bodies. All M8 tasks done. All milestones M0-M8 complete.
All milestones M0-M8 implemented. Platform complete: graph explorer, politician profiles, auth, investigation engine, OG images, PDF export, security hardening, homepage, and seed content.

## Reason
completed

## Status
All tasks completed successfully.

## Summary
- Iterations: 38
- Duration: 2h 50m 1s
- Exit code: 0
